data.name: Lust Epidemic
data.detailed_description:
Join us on Discord


關於此遊戲


A student of East State University named Brad finds himself stranded at rival college Saint Dame University during a hurricane that has unexpectedly changed course and struck the town.

While exploring the ancient and creepy campus grounds you'll uncover many mysteries and secrets... as well as some sexy fun!

In Lust Epidemic you will navigate around the campus and find items and clues that will unfold a mystery as you problem solve your way through the game and build your relationships with the woman you find yourself trapped with.

data.short_description: A student of East State University named Brad finds himself stranded at a rival college Saint Dame University during a hurricane that has unexpectedly changed course and struck the town. Explore the ancient and creepy campus grounds to uncover many mysteries and secrets... as well as some sexy fun!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 Display or better
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 Display or better

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 Display or better
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 Display or better

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 14.04 or Steam OS 2.0 (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 14.04 or Steam OS 2.0 (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
